import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let trimmed = string.trim(line)

  if string.is_empty(trimmed)
    println("YES")
  else
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    mut sorted = true
    mut prev = 0
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    while i < list.len(parts)
      let s = match list.get(parts, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        ""
      end
      let num = match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        n
      when None
        0
      end
      if first
        prev = num
        first = false
      else
        if num < prev
          sorted = false
        end
        prev = num
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if sorted
      println("YES")
    else
      println("NO")
    end
  end
  Ok(())
end
